title: Keep FILTER conditions valid
content: Use FILTER only for expressions over bound variables. Do not use FILTER for predicates that should be part of the triple pattern.
avoid: Do not write FILTER(?contribution pgmr:mentioned pgmr:recall).

title: Bind parent nodes before child fields
content: For nested fields, bind the parent node first. For example, use contribution -> data analysis -> machine learning before accessing metrics.
avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when accessing nested fields.

title: Use label filters for specific validity threats
content: When filtering for validity threats, bind the relevant node and filter its rdfs:label instead of using generic mentions.
avoid: Do not use generic mentions for filtering validity threats.

title: Avoid using relation-like tokens as objects
content: A PGMR triple must be subject relation object. For named concepts, bind a variable and filter its rdfs:label.

title: Use COUNT for distinct counts of papers
content: For counting distinct papers, use COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) instead of incorrect counting methods.
avoid: Do not use incorrect counting methods for distinct papers.

title: Keep triple patterns outside FILTER
content: Use FILTER only for expressions over bound variables. Write subject-relation-object triples outside FILTER.
avoid: Do not write FILTER(?x pgmr:relation pgmr:value).
